predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien: any person who does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
predicates.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

predicates.name: is_in_illegal_stay
predicates.description: The person is in illegal stay: present on the territory without meeting entry or stay conditions.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_dublin_transfer_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed for the purpose of establishing risk of absconding.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the person is current and real.

predicates.name: has_risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: There is a risk of absconding for the person, established following individual examination and based on one or more objective criteria.

predicates.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_country
predicates.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may themselves issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The person is an identified alien under one of the three identification criteria.

predicates.name: criterion_no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
predicates.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

predicates.name: criterion_false_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The person has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents, or committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: criterion_non_cooperation_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

predicates.name: criterion_declared_or_failed_to_comply_with_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

predicates.name: criterion_subject_of_unlifted_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

predicates.name: criterion_concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: While questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an application for international protection.

predicates.name: criterion_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: While questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: criterion_came_for_other_purposes
predicates.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or residence.

predicates.name: criterion_fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.

predicates.name: is_subject_of_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a Dublin transfer procedure.
